mechanism_narrative: A flat or falling FEDFUNDS rate keeps the discount rate anchored while CPI inflation remains contained, supporting equity multiples and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns are negative in more than 55% of periods with FEDFUNDS at or below its 3-month moving average and CPIAUCSL inflation below its 12-month average.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals deteriorating labor income and weaker household spending, which depresses S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 60d forward SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if the average return after the trigger is not below unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in INDPRO indicates industrial demand and production recovery, which improves cyclical earnings expectations and lifts S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns fail to exceed baseline after positive 1-month changes in INDPRO across at least two separate 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and HOUST both improve together, retail activity and housing demand jointly signal broad domestic demand strength, which should lead to higher S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if joint improvements in RSAFS and HOUST do not outperform single-variable signals, or if 60d forward SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of joint-strong episodes.

mechanism_narrative: An abrupt cut in FEDFUNDS after a tightening phase signals policy easing that reduces discount rates and risk premia, producing a short-horizon rebound in S&P 500 returns.
regime_hint: policy pivot from tightening to easing
failure_condition: Reject if 5d forward SPX returns are not above unconditional average after rate-cut triggers, or if the signal is negative in more than 50% of cut episodes.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS stops declining while UNRATE remains elevated, the labor market is stabilizing rather than worsening, which should support equity returns over the next month through better income expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if labor stabilization episodes do not produce higher 20d SPX returns than periods with the same UNRATE level but falling PAYEMS.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in GDPC1 relative to its prior quarter identifies recessionary demand collapse, which should predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if contraction quarters are followed by positive 60d SPX returns in a majority of cases or if the mean return after contraction is not materially below expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: If INDPRO is rising while UNRATE is falling, the economy is creating output and jobs together, which should drive cyclical earnings upgrades and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if combined improvements in INDPRO and UNRATE do not yield higher 20d SPX returns than either indicator alone, or if the signal flips negative in sustained recovery periods.
